title: 8 Signs of a Man Worth Following
caption:
Not his follower count. Not his income. Not how loud he is in the room.

The man worth following is usually the quietest one there. He's already decided who he is — he doesn't need your applause to confirm it.

He's the same in private as in public. He apologizes without a but. He's harder on himself than anyone else. He goes first into the cost. He has two or three men around him who know his actual life and are allowed to say something.

And at the end — he points you toward something bigger than himself. Not his platform. Not his brand. "Follow me, as I follow Christ." — 1 Corinthians 11:1. That's the sentence. Any man willing to say it and mean it is the man worth following.

Save this. Send it to the man who's building that kind of character.

#faith #godlymen #manofgod #christianmen #humility #leadership #christianity #scripture #vision
